subcodes.first_line: O Most Exalted Pen! Sing Thou in the luminous thicket within the Kingdom of creation, then make mention of them whom the divine fragrances have enraptured [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلم الاعلی غن فی الاجمه البیضاء فی ملکوت الانشاء ثم اذکر من اخذته نفحات
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power of prayer, @knowledge; recognition of God
